creator: radovanovic@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Andrej Ebert from comment #8)

Can you please try running this simple test case I am linking here (so we can determine if ProcessName getter is completely broken or it is some specific usage pattern that is causing Sonarr to crash).

Link to test: https://github.com/radovanovic/monobsd/blob/freebsd/mono/tests/process_name.cs
